name: Cherry-Cheesecake (4 Hrs to Overnight)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cake mix according to package directions.
2. Pour the batter into two greased 13-in x 9-in x 2-in baking pans.
3. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted near the center comes out clean.
4. Cool completely.
5. In a mixing bowl, beat one package of cream cheese and confectioner's sugar until fluffy.
6. Fold in the whipped cream.
7. Spread over each cake layer.
8. Top with cherry pie filling.
9. Chill for 4 hours or overnight.
